summary: Audited finer-grained first-batch buttons and quick actions on the corrected baseline. No new write-entry leakage was found beyond the already-frozen canonical read surfaces.

notes: No new finer-grained button or quick-entry residual was found on top of the corrected representative write-path baseline.
Some canonical actions still expose read surfaces without write rights, but that matches the frozen read-only delivery policy rather than a new residual.
Business-admin display semantics remain a separate visibility topic outside this batch.

next_step: Either continue into non-first-batch or non-representative entry audits, or open a product-governance batch if the team wants clearer UI semantics between canonical read entries and quick write entries.
